programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Two families composed of five members each compete against each other in a contest to see who can match more of their answers to survey questions with the most popular answers to the same questions previously posed to a random group of 100 people.

programme.title: 10 News: Lunchtime
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Proud dance mum Trudy takes on the hot seat alongside six others. America's Next Top Model superfan Tristan and former magician's assistant Marion are among those competing.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp returns to host the quiz show with sidekick Sarah Greene - contestants race in moving podiums across the studio floor. Correct answers get the players moving, wrong answers will stop them.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: A quiz in which three pairs of contestants go head-to-head, using their powers of deduction quickly to work out the words that appear in the Lingo grids and puzzle-words.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: 10 News+ delivers in-depth coverage of today's top stories, investigative reports, and stories you haven't heard. Putting the truth first.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Ben Reali a mobile barber from QUEENSLAND who focuses on Grooms on their big day. All he wants is a van to take his operation on the road. Can he cut The Banker down to size as they go head to head?

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: A flight attendant, a Kylie Minogue fan, a dentist and a lab analyst are amongst the six hopefuls taking to the hot seat in this episode, aiming to turn their knowledge into one million dollars.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Six contestants face elimination as they must create a dish that represent their family food traditions to fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: When a serial bride is found bludgeoned in her apartment, Elsbeth investigates the victim's best friend, a particularly experienced, and bitter bridesmaid.

programme.title: 10's Late News
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: The Cheap Seats
programme.desc: Taking a fun look at the week that was are The Cheap Seats hosts Melanie Bracewell and Tim McDonald.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: 10 News+ delivers in-depth coverage of today's top stories, investigative reports, and stories you haven't heard. Putting the truth first.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Ben Reali a mobile barber from QUEENSLAND who focuses on Grooms on their big day. All he wants is a van to take his operation on the road. Can he cut The Banker down to size as they go head to head?

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: A quiz in which three pairs of contestants go head-to-head, using their powers of deduction quickly to work out the words that appear in the Lingo grids and puzzle-words.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. Simon, Charlotte, Jessica, Conor and Lizzy race in moving podiums to try to win £5,000.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Six contestants face elimination as they must create a dish that represent their family food traditions to fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: My Market Kitchen
programme.desc: Laura prepares Noah's cookies, a refined twist on classic amaretti biscuits; Catherine makes a beetroot salad that's great for any side or as a main meal; Tobie prepares a chilli, ginger and lemon condiment.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Two families composed of five members each compete against each other in a contest to see who can match more of their answers to survey questions with the most popular answers to the same questions previously posed to a random group of 100 people.

programme.title: 10 News: Lunchtime
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: A flight attendant, a Kylie Minogue fan, a dentist and a lab analyst are amongst the six hopefuls taking to the hot seat in this episode, aiming to turn their knowledge into one million dollars.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp returns to host the quiz show with sidekick Sarah Greene - contestants race in moving podiums across the studio floor. Correct answers get the players moving, wrong answers will stop them.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Part word game, part puzzle, two teams compete to see who can figure out the most words for a chance to win $100,000. Each word they guess gives them more clues to the correct answer in this fun guessing game that requires both luck and logic.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: 10 News+ delivers in-depth coverage of today's top stories, investigative reports, and stories you haven't heard. Putting the truth first.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Adam Parker wants the Australian Dream - a pool for the backyard. Can he keep his head above water as The Banker tries to sink his dreams.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: From a teacher who worked in South Korea, to a thrill-seeker who jumps out of helicopters for a living, six contestants go head to head for a shot walking away with a life changing prize.

programme.title: Taskmaster Australia
programme.desc: Tough-love Taskmaster Tom Gleeson, along with his loyal sidekick Tom Cashman, put a batch of comedians through their comedic paces.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia's guests are comedians Joanne Mcnally and Guz Khan and singer-songwriter Niall Horan.

programme.title: 10's Late News
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programme.title: 10 News
programme.desc: 10 News+ delivers in-depth coverage of today's top stories, investigative reports, and stories you haven't heard. Putting the truth first.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Adam Parker wants the Australian Dream - a pool for the backyard. Can he keep his head above water as The Banker tries to sink his dreams.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Part word game, part puzzle, two teams compete to see who can figure out the most words for a chance to win $100,000. Each word they guess gives them more clues to the correct answer in this fun guessing game that requires both luck and logic.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A brand new quiz where contestants can win £5,000.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: Building The Dream Home
programme.desc: Architectural designer Charlie Luxton proves dream homes can be affordable. He helps first-time builders design budget-friendly homes that suit their lifestyles.

programme.title: My Market Kitchen
programme.desc: Wendy joins Laura as they make a Swedish potato pudding; Tobie makes tiramisu; Catherine cooks spring onion in the form of a chip; Simone prepares delicious rice paper rolls.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts Family Feud, bringing hilarious moments and families together to compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions.

programme.title: 10 News: Lunchtime
programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.
